pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java source and target version property to 21 to align with the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing compatibility issues if the build environment enforces JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to 3.4.0 to support the Java 21 migration.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.3.x may not fully support or optimize for Java 21 features; upgrading ensures compatibility with the new JDK.
